register.note: Full-width XOR before/after diptych reads at thumbnail scale (straight line fails 75% / bent X solves 100%); capture now shows both panels' full clusters (clip fixed).
Shows the mechanism — the decision boundary, straight-diagonal-fails vs bent-interlocking-X-solves, with the unseparable cluster red-ringed.
Canvas self-labels with an in-frame header, a red '75% ON XOR' readout and x1/x2 axes; discursive text still in the prose column.
Warm cream surface, soft anti-aliased blue/tan gradient field, restrained focal hierarchy — Distill-soft.
Train (live boundary-bending), Reset, a steppable hidden-units control, and a live LOSS readout clear the floor.
blue=prediction-class, orange=truth-class, red-ring=error per DESIGN.md hues; break-frame tan field is class regions, not an all-error dilution.

hero.note: Before/after XOR diptych — one neuron's straight line (75%) vs the hidden-layer bent X (100%); capture clip raised so both panels are fully visible.

assessment.note: Closing transfer is a genuine open free-text prompt with commit/reveal, not an MCQ.

verdict.summary: Clears register 3 on all six dimensions including both hero floors; hero capture clip fixed.
